name: Ascopiave S.p.A.
summary: Ascopiave S.p.A. distributes and sells natural gas in Italy. The company holds concessions and direct assurances for the supply of the service in 268 municipalities; and operates a distribution network of approximately 12,855 kilometers. It is also involved in the sale of electric power; and heat management and co-generation activities. The company is headquartered in Pieve di Soligo, Italy. Ascopiave S.p.A. is a subsidiary of Asco Holding S.p.A.
